sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17789" key="au)tola/lhth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτο-λάλητής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n17789.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who talks to himself,</tr_> Timo <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:50" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">50</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
